title: Pi Agent explained in 6min..
summary: Caleb Writes Code explains Pi, an agent framework that enables unique ways to harness LLMs. The video compares Pi against frontier agents like Claude, Codex, Cursor, and Antigravity, discussing how harness complexity increases as products ship with more integrated features.
